channel.title: ArcLeap Signals
channel.description: Twice-daily technical market telemetry, non-consensus startup opportunities, and developer sentiment shifts — from ArcLeap.

item.title: ArcLeap Signals — June 03, 2026
item.description: Gemma 4 12B ships — encoder-free multimodal that runs on a laptop · OpenAI planning to merge Codex + ChatGPT into one "super app"

item.title: ArcLeap Signals — June 02, 2026
item.description: Anthropic's Mythos burned $1M in tokens to find ~2 dozen critical vulns in 3 weeks · Backprop destroys V1 brain-alignment in a single epoch (RSA-vs-fMRI across…

item.title: ArcLeap Signals — June 01, 2026
item.description: Nvidia & MediaTek Launch "RTX Spark" to Replace the Mouse and Keyboard · Intel Counters with "Crescent Island" Xe3P GPU for On-Device Agents
